scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w packages/electron
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build -w packages/electron && DESKOS_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron packages/electron/dist/main.js
